extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts with a moderate value and within the first 10 time steps does NOT show a sharp, monotonic drop from a high value (it either stays roughly flat or has only mild up‑and‑down variations).
R2: After time step 10, the series maintains a mid‑range level (approximately 0.3–0.6) without a long, deep valley staying below about 0.2 for an extended segment.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins at a relatively high value (around 0.6–0.8) and shows a pronounced early drop within the first 10 time steps, going from that high level down close to the minimum (around 0.1–0.2).
R2: After this early drop, the series recovers to mid or high levels (around 0.4–0.7) and does not remain low; later it may again show a large peak before the final third of the sequence.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very beginning of the series (first 5–10 time steps), there is no sustained high plateau; values quickly dip below about 0.4 after at most a short peak.
R2: After this early dip, the series spends a substantial middle portion (roughly time 10–40) oscillating around mid‑range values (≈0.3–0.6) without a long, smooth upward ramp from low to high.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very beginning of the series (first 5–10 time steps), the signal starts high (around ≥0.6–0.7) and forms a clear short plateau or very gentle descent before dropping to low values.
R2: Following this initial high segment, the series shows a pronounced valley to low values (≈0.1–0.3) and then a relatively smooth climb back up toward high values (≥0.6–0.7) before the major peak around the middle.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the series, there is a pronounced upward spike that reaches a high peak and then quickly falls back down.
R2: After this initial spike, the rest of the series oscillates around a mid-range level (roughly 0.3–0.6) without any long sustained high plateau.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, the values start relatively high and then show a strong, mostly monotonic decrease toward a low valley.
R2: After this early drop, the series remains relatively smooth with broader hills rather than sharp spikes, and does not return to a steep, isolated early peak shape.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the time series, the values do not start very high; they rise only moderately or even dip before any large peak appears.  
R2: Around the middle (roughly 40–60% of the series), there is a pronounced deep valley (sharp drop to a low value) followed by a quick recovery.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts with a steep, tall peak in the very early part (within the first 10% of time), reaching one of the highest values of the whole series and then dropping quickly.  
R2: After this initial peak and drop, the rest of the series fluctuates without another equally dominant early spike; later peaks are comparable or smaller.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series contains at least one *local maximum* above 0.7 followed quickly by a drop below 0.3.  
R2: In the middle region (roughly indices 20–50), the series has a broad “plateau” segment that stays mostly between 0.3 and 0.6 without very sharp peaks above 0.7.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series shows a strong *monotonic-like decline* from around 0.7–0.8 down to below 0.3, without an early sharp peak followed by a deep dip.  
R2: In the middle region (roughly indices 20–45), the series exhibits one pronounced peak above about 0.7 emerging out of values that were mostly between 0.3 and 0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts around a medium value and shows an early *upward* bump/peak (within the first 10–15 time steps) followed by a clear drop.
R2: After the early peak and drop, the series fluctuates around a mid-range level without remaining low or high for a long continuous segment.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a relatively *high* value and then shows a strong, rapid *downward* trend during the first 10–15 time steps.
R2: After this initial strong decline, the series stays mostly below its starting level, with only moderate peaks that do not exceed the original early maximum.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part of the series (first ~10 time steps), there is an early strong spike followed by a sharp drop to one of the lowest points in the whole series.
R2: In the middle–late part of the series (roughly time steps 30–55), there is a tall, narrow peak that rises rapidly from a low value and then quickly falls back to a low value.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: At the very beginning (first ~10 time steps), the series starts high and then shows a long, mostly monotonic decrease down to a clear local minimum.
R2: In the late part of the series (after about time step 50), the values rise from a low level to a sustained higher plateau without immediately dropping back to very low values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early part of the series (first ~10 time steps), the value rises to a pronounced peak above 0.7 and then quickly drops toward ~0.2–0.3.
R2: After a mid‑series region of moderate fluctuations (roughly 0.3–0.6), there is a sharp spike above 0.7 followed by a deep dip below 0.2 in the second half of the series.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early part of the series (first ~10 time steps), the value drops steeply from a high level (~0.7–0.8) down toward around 0.2 or below, without forming an early narrow spike.
R2: In the middle of the series (around one‑third to halfway), the signal stays in a smoother band around 0.4–0.6 without a pronounced spike followed immediately by a very deep dip below 0.2.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is an early positive spike (a local maximum above about 0.6) followed soon by a clear drop (a local minimum below about 0.3).  
R2: After the middle of the series (roughly from 40% onward), the values oscillate in a mid-range band (about 0.3–0.6) without staying low for long (no long segment continuously below 0.3).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, there is a monotonic or near‑monotonic decrease from a relatively high value (above about 0.6) down to a low valley (below about 0.3), without a strong early rebound peak.  
R2: In the last third of the series, there is at least one pronounced rise from a low region (below about 0.3) up to a mid/high region (above about 0.5), forming a late strong upward swing.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series has a clear *local maximum* (peak) above about 0.7 followed within a few steps by a *sharp drop* down toward 0.2–0.3.  
R2: After time step ~40, the series stays mostly *moderate* (roughly between 0.3 and 0.6) without a long high plateau; it oscillates but does not remain near its maximum for many consecutive points.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series shows a *strong monotonic-like fall* from a relatively high value (≈0.7–0.8) down to a low valley near 0.1–0.2, with no preceding sharp early peak-and-drop.  
R2: After this initial fall, from roughly time step 15 onward, the series spends a *long central segment* (≈steps 20–45) in a mid-to-high band (about 0.4–0.7), forming a broad “hill” or plateau before dropping again.
